blurb: ARIA's Safeguarded AI programme (within Mathematics for Safe AI), building an open-source assurance toolkit so AI agents can produce formally verified, fail-safe artefacts.

publications.title: Empowering the next wave of AI-powered science
publications.summary: ARIA insight on the Encode Fellowship (run with Pillar VC) placing top AI researchers into UK academic labs to accelerate science.

publications.title: Moving Targets in AI
publications.summary: Programme Director reflects on evolving benchmarks within ARIA's Scaling Compute programme and a new AI hardware benchmarking funding call.

news.title: An update on the Safeguarded AI pivot
news.summary: ARIA programme directors Nora and davidad sit down with CEO Kathleen Fisher to reflect on the Safeguarded AI programme's progress under davidad's leadership and its pivot to the next phase — a status update on the UK's flagship 'mathematics for safe AI' bet. Month-level date (February 2026) from ARIA's own page.

notes: Safeguarded AI programme page (now under /opportunity-spaces/mathematics-for-safe-ai/safeguarded-ai) confirms £59m programme, updated thesis as of May 2026; programme thesis PDFs and SAILS report are PDFs not dated HTML pages. Publications drawn from ARIA's own /insights pages with real publication dates shown on-page. No controversies where ARIA is a named legal party.
